channel.title: Comments for page "No One Dies Alone"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "No One Dies Alone"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Great story. Wish this got more attention than it did.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The structure of this story drives me crazy. So many repeated sentences structured the same way without variety. Makes it drudgery to read through. Not a fan of this. Even with structure aside, the content is boring. Words are here describing things but it lacks focus and doesn’t seem to be saying much of substance.
